overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character walking through a futuristic city street at dusk, entering a luxury high-rise building, walking through the lobby, and taking an elevator upward. The environment features neon signage, towering skyscrapers, and upscale interior design with red carpets and modern furnishings.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic cyberpunk city street at dusk, passing neon billboards and palm trees. A black sedan drives by on the left as the character approaches a luxury building entrance with red carpet and construction barriers lining the path.

segments.scene_description: Approaching the imposing luxury tower entrance with red carpet leading to automatic doors. The camera tilts up to reveal the building's full height against the dusk sky before entering through the glass doors into the lobby.

segments.scene_description: Walking through the dimly lit luxury lobby featuring red carpet runners, a modern reception desk with red accent lighting, leather seating areas, and vibrant neon wall art. Large windows reveal the cyberpunk city street outside while a person sits on a sofa in the lounge area.

segments.scene_description: Approaching and entering a modern elevator with metallic interior. The doors close and the elevator begins ascending to upper floors, as shown by the illuminated floor indicator panel displaying the upward journey from the lobby level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit cyberpunk street into the sterile, upscale interior of a luxury high-rise. It begins by moving past glowing billboards and palm trees as a black sedan passes by, leading the camera toward a red-carpeted entrance flanked by construction barriers. As the camera reaches the building, it tilts upward to capture the tower's imposing height against the dusk sky before gliding through automatic glass doors into the lobby. The scene then shifts into a dimly lit interior characterized by red accent lighting, leather seating, and vibrant neon art, with the city street still visible through expansive windows. Finally, the camera enters a metallic elevator, where the doors close and an illuminated panel indicates a steady ascent to the upper floors.
